chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Crl. Misc. Application No.S-365 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2025 Mr. Dhani Bakhsh Mari, Assistant Prosecutor General Sindh. = None present for the applicant. Learned APG submitted report on behalf of SHO of PS Bahadurabad which reveals that the alleged detenue is major and solemnized Nikah and subsequently the alleged detenue Mst. Zeenat Begum @ Summariya obtained dissolution of marriage by way of Khula in Family Suit No.2198/2021 passed by Family Judge/Consumer Protection Court, Karachi East, as such essential ingredients of Section 491 Cr.P.C does not meet the criteria to recover and produce alleged detenue being wife of applicant in view of Khula. In view of above, instant Crl. Misc. Application invoking jurisdiction of this court is not maintainable and stands dismissed. JUDGE *Faisal*
